items.title: How Investors Are Reacting To American Express (AXP) Raising Guidance After Strong Premium Card Demand
items.description: American Express recently announced third-quarter 2025 results, reporting higher-than-expected revenue and earnings, and subsequently raised its full-year guidance for both revenue growth and earnings per share as of October 2025. An important insight from this announcement is that the relaunch of the U.S. Consumer and Business Platinum Cards drove a spike in new account sign-ups and confirmed ongoing strong demand among affluent customers, highlighting successful product innovation. We'll...

items.title: Capital One Tries To Mount Comeback With Earnings Due
items.description: Capital One earnings loom with the credit card giant's consumer comments especially important now. The stock is trying to mount a comeback.
